utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one appears to be fully specified: (1) property includes type, location, features, price, and other details; (2) financing includes method, source, and terms (loan_required); (3) legal_services includes package name, costs, currency, and timeline; (4) moving_services includes service level, cost, currency, and features; (5) setup_services includes utility and community packages with costs, currencies, and descriptions; (6) total_budget includes all cost breakdowns and grand total. Therefore, all six items are present and fully detailed.
